历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 5295 → 6895 → 6204 → 7134 → 7902, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1700 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7902; the provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 29 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, leading to slightly increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 43–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean paper fraud, etc.), which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent; Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively hot), with average attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Sociology A, World History A-, with a total of 2 A- or above disciplines; directly related to the Sociology category (Humanities and Social Sciences) in the enrollment majors, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is relatively small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science are highly recommended popular majors, matching the university's Electrical, Electronic Information enrollment majors, positively driving applications for related majors; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 167,000, with an estimated 113,894 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 68%, a decrease of about 3,513 compared to 117,407 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Heilongjiang candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 1.3%–2.3%, which is a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, slight expansion in the 2026 plan, a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, and negative signals from the university's reputation, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 7902; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8036, with a range of 7536–8536.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7536–8536, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Electrical and Materials categories, with Tier 1 Electronic Information Category as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7536), you can focus on reaching for the Electronic Information Category and Science Experimental Class.
